items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for photo/video release within the same form.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of a photo/video release within the same form as part of the liability waiver. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for a photo/video release but does not provide concrete evidence that this feature is implemented or functioning as required, leading to an inconclusive status.
